name: Lano Global Payroll & EOR API
what_it_does: Global payroll and Employer of Record (EOR) platform combining contractor management, EOR, and consolidated global payroll in one API — covering 150+ countries with a compliance layer for both employees and contractors from a single integration.
use_cases: Managing mixed workforce (employees + contractors) globally via single API integration
Running consolidated global payroll across multiple countries via API
Onboarding international employees via EOR with API-driven contract generation
Syncing contractor payment data with accounting systems via webhook
Querying global workforce costs across employee and contractor categories
not_for: Pure domestic payroll without global expansion needs
Enterprise EOR requiring dedicated country managers and premium support
Teams needing purely self-serve API without sales contact
best_when: A scale-up with a mixed workforce (employees + contractors) across multiple countries wants consolidated global payroll and EOR from a single API.
avoid_when: You need only domestic payroll, only contractors, or enterprise-grade dedicated support for complex country-specific compliance.

auth.notes: OAuth2 for HRIS integration. Bearer token auth. API access via enterprise plan. Webhook support for payroll and employment events. No fine-grained OAuth2 scopes currently.

pricing.paid_tiers: EOR from $299/employee/month; Contractor from $25/contractor/month; Global payroll custom
pricing.notes: Mid-market EOR pricing. Berlin-based (German company). EU GDPR-first approach. Covers both EOR and contractor management. Consolidated global payroll for multi-country teams. HRIS integrations (BambooHR, Personio). API via enterprise plan.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for employee and contractor management, payroll, and compliance. OAuth2 for HRIS integration. Webhook support. Documentation less mature than Deel or Remote. Mixed workforce model adds complexity — different data models for employees vs contractors.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Employee and contractor reads idempotent. Payroll runs not idempotent. Contract generation sequential. Status queries idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: Different data models for employees (EOR) vs contractors — must handle both
API access requires enterprise plan engagement
German company — EU data residency by default; US available on request
Consolidated global payroll requires all worker data to be in Lano

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. SOC2 certified. GDPR compliant — German company with strong EU privacy culture. OAuth2 for integrations. EU primary data residency. Employee and contractor PII handled with enterprise security.
